얼굴/신체 단서: 광대 올라 눈가 주름·입꼬리 위로·입술 살짝 벌어짐
Gemini 키워드: genuine Duchenne smile, cheeks raised, crow's-feet wrinkles around the eyes, lip corners pulled up
GPT/영상 산문: A genuine smile that reaches the eyes — cheeks bunch up, crow's-feet form, the mouth opens slightly

Gemini 키워드: a polite social smile, lip corners pulled up but the eyes stay cold and unsmiling
GPT/영상 산문: A practiced, polite smile — the mouth curves up but the eyes remain flat and unmoved

얼굴/신체 단서: 안쪽 눈썹 올라 미간 모임·입꼬리 처짐·턱 올라 주름
Gemini 키워드: inner brows raised and drawn together, lip corners pulled down, chin raised and puckered
GPT/영상 산문: Inner brows pull up and together, the lip corners sag downward, the chin crumples

얼굴/신체 단서: 눈썹 전체 올라 모임·윗눈꺼풀 들림·입 옆으로 당겨 벌어짐
Gemini 키워드: eyebrows raised and pulled together, upper eyelids raised, eyes wide, lips stretched horizontally
GPT/영상 산문: Brows shoot up and knit together, eyes go wide with raised upper lids, the mouth stretches open

얼굴/신체 단서: 미간 내려 찌푸림·윗눈꺼풀 긴장·눈꺼풀 조임·입술 다물어 긴장
Gemini 키워드: brows lowered and drawn together, glaring eyes with tightened lids, lips pressed and tightened
GPT/영상 산문: Brows slam down and together, eyes glare with tightened lids, lips clamp into a tight line

얼굴/신체 단서: 눈썹 전체 위로·눈 크게·턱 떨궈 입 벌어짐
Gemini 키워드: eyebrows raised high, eyes wide open, jaw dropped, mouth agape
GPT/영상 산문: Brows fly up, eyes round wide, the jaw drops and the mouth falls open

Gemini 키워드: nose wrinkled, upper lip raised, cheeks pushed up, slight head recoil
GPT/영상 산문: The nose wrinkles, the upper lip curls up, the head pulls back as if recoiling

얼굴/신체 단서: 한쪽 입꼬리만 올라 조임 — 비대칭 미소
Gemini 키워드: one corner of the mouth tightened and raised, an asymmetric one-sided smirk
GPT/영상 산문: A single lip corner tightens and lifts — a lopsided, dismissive smirk

Gemini 키워드: a tightly controlled face, jaw set, lips pressed, fighting back a visible emotion
GPT/영상 산문: A face straining to stay neutral — jaw set, lips pressed, the suppressed feeling leaking through

Gemini 키워드: a fleeting micro-expression flashing across an otherwise composed face
GPT/영상 산문: For a split second the real feeling flashes across the face before the mask returns

Gemini 키워드: a conflicted expression, smiling mouth but sad worried eyes
GPT/영상 산문: The mouth smiles while the eyes betray sadness — two emotions at war on one face

Gemini 키워드: looking directly into the camera, steady unwavering eye contact
GPT/영상 산문: Steady, direct eye contact held without flinching

Gemini 키워드: eyes averted to the side, avoiding direct eye contact
GPT/영상 산문: The gaze slides away, unwilling to meet the camera

Gemini 키워드: eyes cast downward, looking at the ground
GPT/영상 산문: Eyes drop to the floor, withdrawn

Gemini 키워드: eyes glancing upward, chin slightly lifted
GPT/영상 산문: The gaze lifts upward — pleading, or coolly superior

Gemini 키워드: eyes glistening with welling tears, not yet falling
GPT/영상 산문: Eyes brim and glisten, tears welling but held back

Gemini 키워드: jaw clenched tight, muscle flexing at the jawline
GPT/영상 산문: The jaw locks, the muscle bulging — barely contained anger

Gemini 키워드: lower lip trembling, on the verge of breaking down
GPT/영상 산문: The lower lip quivers, composure about to crack

Gemini 키워드: a vacant thousand-yard stare, unfocused eyes looking past everything
GPT/영상 산문: Eyes fixed on nothing, focus gone — checked out, hollowed

Gemini 키워드: open palms shown, hands spread in a gesture of honesty and openness
GPT/영상 산문: Palms turn outward, hands open — "I have nothing to hide"

Gemini 키워드: jabbing an accusing index finger forward, pointing aggressively
GPT/영상 산문: An index finger stabs forward, accusing

Gemini 키워드: arms crossed tightly over the chest, closed-off posture
GPT/영상 산문: Arms fold tight across the chest — closed, defensive

Gemini 키워드: fingertips pressed together in a steeple, a confident power gesture
GPT/영상 산문: Fingertips meet in a steeple — calculated, in control

Gemini 키워드: touching the nose or covering the mouth, hand drifting to the face
GPT/영상 산문: A hand drifts to the mouth or nose mid-sentence

Gemini 키워드: leaning forward toward the listener, engaged and intent
GPT/영상 산문: The torso tips forward, leaning in — engaged, pressing

Gemini 키워드: shoulders slumped, head hung low, posture collapsed in defeat
GPT/영상 산문: Shoulders cave, head drops, the whole body sags

Gemini 키워드: chin lifted high, looking down the nose, defiant posture
GPT/영상 산문: The chin juts up, looking down the nose — unbowed

Gemini 키워드: expansive power pose, hands on hips, taking up space, chest out
GPT/영상 산문: A wide, space-claiming stance — hands on hips, chest out

Gemini 키워드: body shrinking, shoulders pulled in, making oneself small
GPT/영상 산문: The body folds in on itself, shrinking small

Gemini 키워드: standing intimately close / at a polite social distance apart
GPT/영상 산문: The gap between them speaks — pressed intimately close, or coldly apart

얼굴/신체 단서: 가슴 펴고 턱·고개 살짝 뒤로·작은 미소·팔 허리(아킴보) 또는 들어올림
Gemini 키워드: chest expanded, head tilted slightly back, a small satisfied smile, arms akimbo or raised in triumph
GPT/영상 산문: The chest puffs out, the head tilts back, a small smug smile — arms set on the hips or raised

얼굴/신체 단서: 고개 푹 숙임·시선 아래·어깨 안으로 말려 몸 작아짐·얼굴 가림 경향
Gemini 키워드: head dropped low, gaze cast down, shoulders collapsing inward, the body shrinking
GPT/영상 산문: The head sinks, eyes drop, shoulders fold in — the whole body wants to disappear

얼굴/신체 단서: 시선 회피하나 상대 쪽으로 몸 기욺·입가/뺨 긴장·해명하려는 손짓 동반
Gemini 키워드: averted eyes but the body leaning toward the other, tension around the mouth, a placating hand
GPT/영상 산문: 눈은 피하되 몸은 상대 쪽으로, 입가 긴장에 달래는 손짓

얼굴/신체 단서: 시선 아래로 피함·고개 옆으로 돌림·어색한 미소·손이 얼굴로·홍조
Gemini 키워드: gaze down and away, head turned aside, an awkward nervous smile, a hand drifting to the face, flushed cheeks
GPT/영상 산문: Eyes dart down and away, the head turns aside, a sheepish smile, a hand to the face, cheeks reddening

얼굴/신체 단서: 곁눈으로 흘김·입술 비틀림·미간 살짝 조임·턱 긴장 — 부러움과 적의 혼재
Gemini 키워드: a sidelong envious glance, lips twisted, brows slightly knit, jaw tight with resentment
GPT/영상 산문: 곁눈으로 흘기며 입술 비틀리고 미간 조임 — 부러움과 적의

얼굴/신체 단서: 눈 크게·눈썹 올라·입 살짝 벌어짐·고개 위로·정지된 응시
Gemini 키워드: eyes widened, brows raised, mouth slightly open, head tipped up in a frozen, reverent stare
GPT/영상 산문: 눈 크게 뜨고 눈썹 올라 입 살짝 벌어진 채 위를 올려다봄

얼굴/신체 단서: 초점 흐린 먼 응시·입가 옅은 미소·고개 약간 기욺 — 슬픔과 온기 혼재
Gemini 키워드: a soft unfocused faraway gaze, a faint wistful smile, head tilted, eyes glistening slightly
GPT/영상 산문: 초점 흐린 먼 시선에 옅은 미소, 고개 살짝 기욺 — 아련함

얼굴/신체 단서: 참았던 숨 길게 내쉼·어깨 툭 떨어짐·눈 감았다 뜸·긴장 풀린 미소
Gemini 키워드: a long held breath released, shoulders dropping, eyes closing briefly, tension melting into a soft smile
GPT/영상 산문: 참았던 숨 길게 내쉬며 어깨가 툭 떨어지고 긴장이 풀림
비고: AN-37(참던 숨)과 세트. 위기 모면 풍자

Gemini 키워드: the head stays forward but the eyes slide sideways in a suspicious sidelong glance
GPT/영상 산문: 고개는 그대로 눈만 옆으로 흘김 — 의심·견제
비고: EM-35 질투와 세트. 정치 견제 풍자

얼굴/신체 단서: 눈은 향하나 깜빡임 폭증·초점 흔들림으로 회피를 누설
Gemini 키워드: the eyes stay aimed but blink rapidly, focus wavering, betraying avoidance
GPT/영상 산문: 눈은 향해 있으나 깜빡임이 폭증하고 초점이 흔들림

얼굴/신체 단서: 눈썹 오르내림·입 크게 또렷이 움직임·시선 직격·박자 맞춘 표정
Gemini 키워드: animated brows rising and falling, mouth moving clearly, direct gaze, expressions punctuating each point
GPT/영상 산문: 눈썹 오르내리고 입 또렷이 움직이며 시선 직격 — 설득조

얼굴/신체 단서: 입 크게 벌어짐·목 힘줄 불거짐·미간 조임·눈 부릅뜸
Gemini 키워드: mouth wide open, neck tendons straining, brows clenched, eyes bulging in a shout
GPT/영상 산문: 입 크게 벌리고 목 힘줄 솟으며 미간 조여 부릅뜬 눈

얼굴/신체 단서: 입술 거의 닫힌 채 작게 움직임·눈은 옆 경계·고개 상대 쪽 기욺
Gemini 키워드: lips barely parted, moving in a hush, eyes glancing sideways warily, head leaning close
GPT/영상 산문: 입술 거의 닫힌 채 작게 움직이고 눈은 옆을 경계하며 고개 기욺
비고: EM-30 근접학·GST-19 밀착과 세트. 결탁 풍자

얼굴/신체 단서: 깊게 팬 주름이 표정을 증폭 — 미간·팔자·눈가 골이 감정 따라 깊어짐
Gemini 키워드: deeply etched wrinkles amplifying the expression, furrows deepening with each emotion
GPT/영상 산문: 깊게 팬 주름이 감정 따라 더 깊어지며 표정을 증폭
비고: 캐리커처 연령 표현. 인물 풍자 디테일

얼굴/신체 단서: 압박↑일수록 표정 통제가 미세하게 무너짐 — 입꼬리 떨림·삼킴·눈 깜빡
Gemini 키워드: under mounting pressure the controlled face micro-cracks: a twitching lip corner, a hard swallow, a flickering blink
GPT/영상 산문: 압박이 오를수록 입꼬리 떨림·침 삼킴·깜빡임으로 통제가 미세하게 깨짐
